# Purchase Invoice Plan - Retention

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module include Payment Retention option for invoices created by invoice plan.

:::{IMPORTANT}
This is an alpha version, the data model and design can change at any time without warning.
Only for development or testing purpose, do not use in production.
[More details on development status](https://odoo-community.org/page/development-status)
:::

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

- Create purchase order with invoice plan as normal
- On Invoice Plan tab, choose retention type (percent or amount)
- Create invoice from invoice plan as normal, each invoice will has field "Payment Retention" set.
